message:
feat(fusion): harden RRF with NaN/Infinity fallback, expand queue capabilities, and add interaction integration tests

federated.rs: extract DEFAULT_FEDERATED_RRF_K = 60.0 constant and add
sanitize_rrf_k() that falls back to the default for NaN, Infinity, or
negative values, preventing undefined ranking behavior from malformed
config. Includes test verifying the fallback path.

queue.rs (+217 lines): expand embedding queue with additional batching
strategies, priority-aware draining, and backpressure signaling for
high-throughput indexing workloads.

rrf.rs: extend Reciprocal Rank Fusion with additional scoring
normalization and edge-case handling.

interaction_oracles.rs: minor refinements to interaction oracle logic.

interaction_integration.rs (+622 lines): comprehensive integration
test suite exercising the full interaction pipeline including federated
search, queue management, and oracle-driven result merging under
concurrent load.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
